preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known as a standard 
retail pharmacy within a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_INNPP_COINS_3M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this 
field; see instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (PRE_ICL_INNPP_COPAY_3M).
